flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 28% at South Puget Sound Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.7k vs 3.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at South Puget Sound Community College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5k → 3.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at South Puget Sound Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at South Puget Sound Community College fell 44% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.4k → $5.8k).
